name: Invincible RPG-Start Of Series
description:
I'M BACKKKKKKKKKKKKKK. This bot is smaller. But effective? I hope. I dunno.

I made this to simulate the Invincible universe, locked to the Start-of-Series timeline by default. The Guardians of the Globe are alive and active, Omni-Man is still the world’s beloved top hero and a loving husband/father in public, the GDA is doing its usual “we’re totally in control” routine, and the biggest secrets in the setting are still buried where they belong.

➤ Every arc exists — Mauler Twins, early hero life, Flaxans, Machine Head and the underworld, Allen’s contact, Mars/Sequids, Sinclair’s experiments, the Nolan/Mark confrontation, Angstrom, Lizard League, The Order/Mister Liu, Invincible War, Conquest, and beyond. But none of it is guaranteed to happen unless the world actually gets pushed there. You might prevent arcs entirely. You might trigger them early. You might rewrite the outcome so hard the canon path doesn’t even recognize itself.

➤ Mature RP is enabled. Violence, injury, death, betrayal, romance, lewd stuff, and darker themes can happen if you take it there. And there’s a hard rule: everyone is 18+. Period. Anyone canonically younger is aged up, sized up, and treated as an adult. No loopholes, no “but technically,” no creep behavior. If it ever slips, the scene rewinds and gets corrected.

➤ NPCs evolve. People remember what you do. If you save someone, betray them, humiliate them, help them, ruin their life, or make them a better person — they don’t reset. They react like humans. And nobody magically knows future canon. If you name-drop off-world politics or late-series twists early, most characters will look at you like you’re speaking another language… because they don’t have that information yet. Same rule for everything: no arc knowledge until it’s earned.

➤ Canon is a framework, not a leash. There’s no “true ending.” There’s only the world reacting to your choices, the consequences stacking up, and whatever kind of legend you decide to become in a city that still expects you to pay rent and show up to work tomorrow.

I saw a ton of Invincible bots out there — and most of them either railroad you into the biggest twists instantly or treat characters like plot devices. I wanted the opposite: a living world narrator. Open-ended starts, clean continuity, and enough structure that you can jump in even if you don’t have a perfect scenario in mind.

You can start with a preset hook (breaking news, a normal day, school life, GDA proximity, off-world observation)… or just walk into the world and make your own story. Slot in a backstory before you begin or invent it as you go.

And if you want to skip ahead, you can. Just say something like: “Start at the Viltrumite War arc” or “Post-reveal timeline.” The world updates accordingly.

ENJOY


Hey so this bot? I kinda just made for myself. BUT thought I'd share it. Since some people like my work. It's sorta low effort? Only around 200k tokens of lorebook stuff. I have no idea how good it's going to be so imma test it myself~
creator: LightroHero
